Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
# Extract frame names from OnlyBoss.aseprite.meta
import re

with open\(r'C:\\Users\\user\\UnityProjects\\Strapped\\Assets\\Animations\\BossAnimations\\OnlyBoss.aseprite.meta', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all sprite frame names
frames = re.findall\(r'- name: \(OnlyBoss_Frame_\\d+\)', content\)
print\("OnlyBoss.aseprite frames:"\)
for i, frame in enumerate\(frames\):
    print\(f"{i}: {frame}"\)

# Find OnlyBossAnimationsLastTry frames
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\user\\UnityProjects\\Strapped\\Assets\\Animations\\BossAnimations\\OnlyBossAnimationsLastTry.aseprite.meta', 'r'\) as f:
    content2 = f.read\(\)

frames2 = re.findall\(r'- name: \(Frame_\\d+\)', content2\)
print\("\\nOnlyBossAnimationsLastTry.aseprite frames \(first 20\):"\)
for i, frame in enumerate\(frames2[:20]\):
    print\(f"{i}: {frame}"\)
print\(f"... total {len\(frames2\)} frames"\)
EOF)
